ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., ATL, BOS) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport (e.g., Atlanta, GA: Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier (e.g., American Airlines Inc., Delta Air Lines Inc.) */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the carrier (e.g., AA, DL) */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the carrier (e.g., AAL, DAL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_reasons" (
  "delay_reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay reason */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the delay reason (e.g., carrier, late aircraft, national aviation system, security, weather) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delay reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the flight departed */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carrier operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number (e.g., AA101, DL202) */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the flight */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Arrival date of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_statistics" (
  "flight_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of flight statistics */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the flights departed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the flight statistics */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight statistics */,
  "cancelled" INTEGER /* Number of flights cancelled */,
  "delayed" INTEGER /* Number of flights delayed */,
  "diverted" INTEGER /* Number of flights diverted */,
  "on_time" INTEGER /* Number of flights on time */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of flights */,
  "average_delay_minutes" TEXT /* Average delay minutes for delayed flights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_statistics_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_statistics" (
  "delay_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of delay statistics */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the flights departed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the delay statistics */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the delay statistics */,
  "carrier_delays" INTEGER /* Number of carrier delays */,
  "late_aircraft_delays" INTEGER /* Number of late aircraft delays */,
  "national_aviation_system_delays" INTEGER /* Number of national aviation system delays */,
  "security_delays" INTEGER /* Number of security delays */,
  "weather_delays" INTEGER /* Number of weather delays */,
  "average_delay_minutes" TEXT /* Average delay minutes for all delays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_statistics_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "flight_delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that was delayed */,
  "delay_reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delay reason */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the flight was delayed */,
  "delay_description" TEXT /* Description of the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_delay_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("delay_reason_id") REFERENCES delay_reasons ("delay_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_carriers" (
  "airport_carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport-carrier relationship */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carrier */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the airport-carrier relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the airport-carrier relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_carriers_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_carriers_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_airport_access" (
  "user_airport_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-airport relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_airport_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_airport_access_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_airport_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_comments" (
  "flight_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight comment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment for the flight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_comments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
